title: How the Makers of ‘Mr. Nobody Against Putin’ Addressed ‘an Ethical Minefield’
summary_full: The documentary about Vladimir V. Putin’s wartime indoctrination of Russian schoolchildren won an Oscar at Sunday’s Academy Awards.
